title: Smore'd
description: This is just one GIANT outer wilds reference :D
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be100206b81e6071dae5bea9fa628eb3b8fae15d.png) please do not upload this to any other site without Addie's permission ------------- [](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smored) [](https://modrinth.com/project/smored) [](https://fabricmc.net/) [](https://neoforged.net/) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac87b58331af401c559133e1438798e88a55d6.png) -------------

Small Q&A!

### What does this add / do? - This takes inspiration from Outerwild's Marshmallow mechanics by adding the ability to cook them and much more... ### Will this mod be ported to forge or neoforge? - (forge) Nope. I just don't have the time to maintain multiple mod versions. You can look at the `dev blog` page [on my website](https://addi3.codeberg.page) for a detailed answer. - (neoforge) Yes, someone else is working on an "official" port of the mod (https://codeberg.org/vmbbi/smored-neoforged) ### What is this mod compatible with? - This mod by default should work with pretty much every mod, there are how ever specific mod that have compatibilty. That being; Create: Aeronautics, Create ### How do i get access to betas? - You can access betas via my [Ko-fi page](https://ko-fi.com/addi3dabaddie)! ### Can you add... / How do you use...? - You can suggest stuff on the issues page or on my official [discord server](https://discord.gg/5JDKuzarcS)! I will also answer any questions on either site! ### Is there a WIKI? - [Old wiki 1.20.1](https://addi3.github.io/smored_wiki) - [New wiki 1.21.1+](https://addi3.codeberg.page/wikipages/smored_main.html) ------------- -------------

Required Mods!

- YACL (latest 1.21.1 version) -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl/versions?g=1.21.1&l) - Pommel (latest 1.21.1 version fabric only) -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/pommel-held-item-models/versions?g=1.21.1&l=fabric)

Recommended Mods!

- JEI (latest 1.21.1 version) -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/versions?g=1.21.1) - Mod Menu (latest 1.21.1 version fabric only) -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/versions?g=1.21.1&l=fabric) ------------- -------------
